current_block.label: Morning standup and gate check
current_block.action: Read the current gate (TASK-050), name blockers in one sentence each, and pick today's single decision.

block_queue.label: Morning standup and gate check
block_queue.action: Read the current gate (TASK-050), name blockers in one sentence each, and pick today's single decision.

block_queue.label: Submission dry run
block_queue.action: Walk the full TASK-044 store submission on a clean device profile and record the sign-off in the checklist.

block_queue.label: Beta feedback triage
block_queue.action: Label new tickets and playtest notes; escalate anything crash-related to the QA rotation.

block_queue.label: Quickstart rewrite slice
block_queue.action: Advance TASK-061 with fresh 1.0 screenshots and matching first-run copy.

block_queue.label: Review queue pass
block_queue.action: Resolve or explicitly defer the TASK-058 pricing packet; nothing stays silently pending.

user_signal.exact_ask: Start block 1: Morning standup and gate check? Reply 'Start block 1' to begin, or name a different block to reorder.

completion_signal.exact_ask: When a block is done, reply 'Done block N' with one line on what actually happened; the runner never marks blocks done on its own.
